calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms
Off Calendar Oct-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello and Richard Shu for Deborah Connell-Cruse.

The Court asked for the amount of the gift. Ms. Robello stated that it is a residuary gift in the amount of $60,666.66. The Court confirmed that the school district has no problem with this, that it has a statement of non-opposition from the Attorney General's office and that the modification makes sense and effectuates the intent of the trustor. The Court granted the petition for order approving modification of trust terms and signed the order in open court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms
Off Calendar Sep-29-2015 Continued To Oct-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
